name: Tom Browne
abstract: Tom Browne (born October 30, 1954) is an American jazz trumpeter. He rose to prominence with Sonny Fortune and had major hits in 1980 and 1981: the No.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Bob James and Earl Klugh

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: Tom Browne had just had this big hit called, “Funkin’ for Jamaica.” ... “Have you heard Tom Browne’s record? That’s new.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
